props.ChoiceText: One journey paid well enough to make all the dust, delay, and danger feel briefly worthwhile.
props.ChoiceBio: A successful caravan reminded you why merchants keep risking road, weather, and theft.

0.TransitionText: Because a successful caravan reminded you why merchants keep risking road, weather, and theft, you stayed in trade, trusting ledgers, favors, and nerve more than clean dealing.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Merchant, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because a successful caravan reminded you why merchants keep risking road, weather, and theft, profit began to lie beyond familiar roads, and trade drew you toward riskier horizons.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Explorer, but you may remain on your current path instead.
